title: 20cm Christmas Pre-Lit LED Musical Nativity Scene Acrylic Sculpture Battery Operated Light Up Xmas Tabletop Home Decorations
features: 🎄🕯️ [BEAUTIFULLY CRAFTED] : Featuring Jesus, Mary, Joseph and the three wise men, this Nativity scene will create a very special Christmas feel in your home. Its clear acrylic construction adds a touch of elegance to your décor.
🎄🕯️ [LIGHT UP & MUSICAL] : An Acrylic Nativity Scene with LED Auto Changing Function and Beautiful Festiv Carol Music.
🎄🕯️ [BATTERY OPERATED] : Requires 3 AAA Batteries (Not Included) for Easy Use.
🎄🕯️ [MEASUREMENT] : Dimensions: 20 x 14 x 18cm for Perfect Placement. Ideal for Under the Christmas Tree, Tabletop Centerpiece, Fireplace Mantel, and More. Holy decoration.

🎄🕯️ [DECORATIVE PLACEMENT] : It is suitable for various settings, including under the Christmas tree, as a tabletop centerpiece, or on the fireplace mantel. Great Christmas gift for your friends and family. Randomly select design from star/angel.
description: Key Features of our Christmas Nativity Set: With Jesus, Mary, Joseph and the three wise men, this Nativity scene will create a very special Christmas feel in your home. Adds Festive Magic to Your Home Beautifully Crafted in Clear Acrylic Material Ideal for Under the Christmas Tree, Tabletop Centerpiece, Fireplace Mantel, and More An Acrylic Nativity Scene with LED Auto Changing Function and Festiv Music. Requires 3 AAA Batteries (Not Included) for Easy Use Dimensions: 20 x 14 x 18cm for Perfect Placement Randomly select from two design (Star/Angel) This Nativity Set is designed to bring the true spirit of Christmas into your home. Its clear plastic construction adds a touch of elegance to your decor, making it suitable for various settings, including under the Christmas tree, as a tabletop centerpiece, or on the fireplace mantel. SHATCHI is the market leading supplier of everything you need to make your Christmas as beautiful as ever! From Christmas Trees, indoor and outdoor lights and decorations, to Christmas ornaments such as nutcrackers, festive train sets and candle bridges, the SHATCHI has everything you need to decorate your home today.
